content: C1: Eastern Time en mlb_stats_api (DEFAULT_SEASON, IL/bullpen today)
C2: Cache validation en get_schedule_with_probables + ContextVar cache_status
C1: Eastern Time en mlb_day_orchestrator (analyze_mlb_day date default)
C3: pipeline_meta enriquecido (cache_status, source_used, dropped_missing_pitchers, schedule_games_found, date_basis) en mlb_day_orchestrator + log final
C3: pipeline_meta en _run_analysis_pipeline (server.py) para que el flujo Generar picks también lo entregue
C1: FECHA ACTUAL en analyst_engine.py para baseball usa Eastern
UI: Panel Pipeline debug + humanized abort_reason en AnalysisProgressModal
Testing agent end-to-end del flujo MLB con pipeline_meta
